title: The art of the possible with Kiro
summary: Jamie Wenzel demonstrates multi-session AI orchestration using Kiro CLI, which enables coordination of independent chat sessions into a unified workforce with shared state, task management, governance, and real-time observability. The presentation covers best practices and includes a working application demo.
